back_translation: Therefore, be people who imitate God, in the position of beloved children
And walk in life in love, just as Lord Christ loved us and offered Himself for us as an offering and a sacrifice to God, as a fragrant aroma
But sexual immorality, all impurity, or greed — let none of these be mentioned among you, because it is fitting for the saints
Both vulgar speech, foolish words, or coarse mockery, which are not appropriate; but rather let it be thanksgiving

Because you should know surely that whoever commits sexual immorality, or is impure, or greedy — that is, one who worships idols — will not have any inheritance in the kingdom of Lord Christ and of God
Do not let anyone deceive you with empty words, because these things are the cause that the wrath of God is coming upon the sons of disobedience
Therefore, do not be people who share with them
Because at one time you were darkness, but now you are light in Lord Jesus; live in life as children of light
Because the fruit of the light is all goodness, righteousness, and truth
Test and verify what is pleasing to Lord Jesus
Do not have part in the fruitless deeds of darkness; but rather, expose them so they appear
Because what they do in secret — even to speak of it is shameful
But everything that is exposed by the light is made apparent
Because everything that is made apparent is light. Therefore there is a saying — ‘Wake up, you who are sleeping; rise up from the dead, and Lord Christ will shine light upon you’
Therefore, be careful with thoroughness about how you live in life — not as foolish people, but as people of wisdom
Use the opportunity that exists to its full value, because the days in this age are evil
Therefore, do not be foolish people; but understand what the will of Lord Jesus is
Do not be drunk with wine, which leads to reckless dissipation; but be filled to overflowing with the Spirit
Speak to one another with psalms, hymns of praise, and spiritual songs; sing and make music in your hearts to Lord Jesus
Give thanks to God and the Father in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ for all things always
Submitting yourselves to one another in reverence of Lord Christ
Wives, submit yourselves to your own husbands, just as you submit to Lord Jesus
Because the husband is the head of the wife, just as Lord Christ is the head of the church; He Himself is the Savior of that body
But just as the church submits to Lord Christ, wives also should submit to their husbands in everything, in the same way
Husbands, love your wives, just as Lord Christ loved the church and offered Himself for the church
So that He may sanctify the church to be holy, by washing with the cleansing of water through the word
So that He may present the church to Himself as a glorious church, having no stain or wrinkle, or any thing such as those, but as a church that is holy and without blemish
In the same way, husbands also should love their wives like loving their own bodies; one who loves his own wife also loves himself
Because no one has ever hated his own body, but nourishes and cherishes that body, just as Lord Christ does to the church
Because we are members of the body of His
‘For this reason, a man will leave his father and his mother, and will be united with his wife, and the two will become one flesh’
This mystery is great, but I am speaking concerning Lord Christ and the church
However, each one of you also must love his wife like loving himself; and the wife must respect and reverence the husband
